layout_strategies.sidebar_nav: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white h-screen sticky top-0

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 h-10 px-4 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.search_large: h-14 text-lg px-6 rounded-full shadow-sm border-slate-200 focus-visible:ring-blue-600

cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer hover:border-blue-200
cards.locked: bg-slate-50 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 border-dashed relative overflow-hidden

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-700
badges.pending: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-amber-700
badges.risk: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700
badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-600

login.layout: Split screen: Left side branding/image (50%), Right side form (50%)
login.visuals: Use 'login_bg' with a dark overlay on the left. Clean, centered form on the right.

dashboard_main.layout: Top search bar (hero-like). Below: Grid of 'Recent Searches' or 'Watchlist'.
dashboard_main.search_experience: Central, prominent input field. Real-time validation feedback.

vendor_profile.layout: Three-phase vertical layout or Tabbed interface.
vendor_profile.phase_2: Network graph or List view for Related GSTINs.
vendor_profile.phase_3: Locked state initially. Blur overlay with 'Unlock' button. After unlock: Financial charts + Document list.

general: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use intentional asymmetry where appropriate.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can elevate the 'paper' feel of the dashboard.
accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
Interactive elements must have focus states (ring-2 ring-blue-600).
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
motion: Use 'framer-motion' for smooth layout transitions (layout prop).
Stagger children animations for lists and grids.
Duration: 0.2s - 0.3s for UI interactions. 0.5s for page transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a 'Layout' component that wraps pages with the Sidebar/Header structure.
Use the 'Manrope' font for the entire application. Add it to index.css via Google Fonts import.
Implement the 'Verification Badge' as a reusable component.
For the 'Financial Unlock' feature, use a blurred overlay on the actual data container until unlocked.
Use 'Recharts' for the Turnover and Financial graphs.
Ensure the 'GSTIN Search' is the focal point of the main dashboard.
